title: Transaction Timeline
description: The system shall provide a scrollable timeline screen listing all transactions in descending date order, grouped by month. Split receipt rows shall be visually grouped. The screen shall support filtering by owner_label, category, and project.
acceptance_criteria: All transactions appear in descending date order
Month separator headers divide transactions by calendar month
Transactions sharing a receipt_group_id are shown as an indented group
Each row displays the full digital date (DD/MM/YY) on the left side
The account name is displayed on the right side, directly below the amount
Transfer transactions display both source and target accounts as 'From -> To'
For cross-currency (FX) transfers, both the source and target amounts are displayed as 'Amount -> TargetAmount'
System transactions (Opening balance, Reconciliation) use clean names without underscores and hide redundant notes
Filtering by category shows only transactions of that category
Filtering by owner_label shows only transactions with that label
Filtering by project shows only transactions tagged to that project, regardless of category
